refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump phases to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle allows focused design and verification of each segment, improving clarity and traceability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for each sub-phase (load, travel, dump) under defined duty cycle and site conditions; verify combined cycle time meets CT_target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

candidate_dps: DP1: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for load phase efficiency
DP2: Optimize vehicle navigation and path planning for travel phase
DP3: Optimize dump mechanism and control for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to address each sub-FR distinctly

potential_sources: Interdependencies between travel and load phases timing
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase but require interface coordination; manageable coupling with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle subsystems can be independently optimized without adverse cross-phase effects
Risk of timing conflicts if control coordination is insufficient
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor integration during implementation to ensure timing coordination; consider iterative refinement if coupling issues arise.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for load, travel, and dump phases

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle targets from NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety alerts to Safety Services during cycle operations

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module fully contains physical and control elements for cycle phases; minimal diffusion.
NGHE Solution oversees coordination but does not directly implement cycle phase controls.
Teleoperation involved in remote control but not primary cycle time optimization.
Safety Services monitors but does not implement cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the primary owner of cycle time optimization DPs due to direct control over physical and control systems.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for coordination functions
Risk of diffusion if cycle time logic is duplicated in Teleoperation or NGHE Solution
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface contracts and avoid duplication of cycle time logic outside Vehicle module.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-FRs; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR with acceptable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of cycle time logic duplication across NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for cycle time DPs; interfaces to other modules are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and tasking interfaces is feasible; cycle time measurements can be traced to Vehicle module performance.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time functions to Vehicle module with supporting interfaces to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

recommended_revisions: Monitor and control diffusion risks during implementation
Refine interface definitions if coordination complexity increases

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet requirements with manageable risks; no immediate need to zigzag or revise.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

revise.why: No significant issues identified requiring revision at this level.

assumptions: Vehicle subsystems can be optimized independently
open_risks: Potential diffusion of cycle time logic across modules
evidence_needed: Cycle time performance data from Vehicle module
